final:
module reset_controller (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [4-1:1-1] count
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000; // Reset the counter to 0
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1; // Increment the counter
        end
    end
endmodule
